Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
Most parameters are within normal limits. Notable findings include mild anemia (low hemoglobin), elevated chloride, increased platelet size and distribution width, and low urine specific gravity. These may suggest mild anemia of unclear etiology, possible electrolyte imbalance, and dilute urine. Correlation with clinical context and further evaluation may be considered if symptoms are present.
